## Scope @SRS-001-sec1

This document defines the high-level requirements for SpecCompiler , a document processing pipeline for structured specifications.

The document is organized in two parts. The first part defines the SpecIR data model, the six core types that the [Pipeline](#TERM-15) operates on. The second part specifies the functional requirements, grouped into System Features ([SF-001](#SF-001) through [SF-006](#SF-006)), each decomposed into High-Level Requirements.
